intro: Embark on a Serene Journey with Weekend Solitaire: Voyage!
description:
Weekend Solitaire: Voyage offers a colorful array of puzzles through a gentle cascade of challenges. 
As you navigate through vibrant and dynamically animated levels, your strategic mind is both soothed and tested, immersing you into a relaxed, yet focused state. 
With every card turned and each layout solved, the game crafts an inviting and seamless experience, designed to delicately engage and guide you through the subtle mastery of solitaire.

130 Meticulously Designed Levels Across Four Distinct Card Decks!
Weekend Solitaire: Voyage extends an invitation to explore 130 meticulously designed levels, played across four distinct card decks. 
The game intertwines obstacles that keenly beckon your tactical insights with bonuses that appreciatively reward your strategic play. 
The narrative unfolds where every card and each layout becomes a chapter of a story, melding tranquility and strategy into a singular, engrossing experience.
